days.title: Arrival and Little India Exploration
days.weather: Partly cloudy, 32°C, chance of afternoon thunderstorms.
activities: Enjoy traditional Indian cuisine for dinner
days.budgetNote: Low-cost day; mostly free walking and affordable street food.

days.title: Chinatown Heritage and Maxwell Food Centre
days.budgetNote: Moderate budget; affordable hawker meals and low-cost attraction entry.

days.title: Gardens by the Bay and Marina Bay Sands
activities: Visit Cloud Forest and Flower Dome
Walk through Gardens by the Bay
Watch the Light & Sound Show at Marina Bay
days.budgetNote: Higher budget day due to paid conservatories; free outdoor gardens and light show.

days.title: Sentosa Island Relaxation and Departure
days.budgetNote: Moderate to high budget depending on entertainment choices; budget-friendly beach options available.

categories.name: Clothing
items: Lightweight long-sleeve shirt for AC indoors and temple visits
Modest clothing (knees and shoulders covered) for Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple
Sandals or flip-flops for walking and beach
Comfortable walking shoes for extensive exploring
Light rain jacket or compact umbrella

categories.name: Toiletries & Health
items: Basic first aid kit (plasters, pain reliever, anti-diarrheal)

categories.name: Electronics
items: Universal power adapter (if required for your home country)

categories.name: Documents & Money
items: Hotel and flight confirmations (digital or print)
Some Singapore Dollars in cash for hawker centers and small vendors

categories.name: Miscellaneous
items: Small backpack or day bag for daily excursions
Eye mask and earplugs for hotel sleep

budgetPlan.summary: Plan around $415 per day, including a built-in $124 trip buffer for emergencies, weather changes, or outfit-related purchases.

dayPlans.title: Day 1

places.guidance: Aim for $27 or less here; count it under activities.
Aim for $27 or less here; count it under activities.
Aim for $27 or less here; count it under activities.
Aim for $27 or less here; count it under activities.

dayPlans.tip: Book fixed-price activities first, then use the remaining food and shopping caps as flexible spend.

dayPlans.title: Day 2

places.guidance: Keep entry tickets, snacks, and local transport under $108.

dayPlans.tip: Use this as a daily envelope and move unused money into the next day.
